evals.prompt: The captain just told me his boat has 450 engine hours and he docks at Clearwater Marina. His userId is user_bobby_b08861b8 and his boat ID is boat_3fa2e1. Update his profile with both pieces of info.
evals.expected_output: Agent should produce a `swain boat update boat_3fa2e1 --engineHours=450 --json` command for engine hours (boat-level field) and a `swain user update user_bobby_b08861b8 --marinaLocation="Clearwater Marina" --json` command for marina (user-level field). Both must include --json. Agent should NOT put marinaLocation on the boat update or engineHours on the user update.

assertions.text: Uses `swain boat update` (not user update) for engineHours
Uses `swain user update` (not boat update) for marinaLocation
All swain commands include the --json flag
Uses exact field names: engineHours (not engine_hours) and marinaLocation (not marina or dock)

evals.prompt: I need to build a morning briefing for user_bobby_b08861b8. Pull relevant cards, check what they got yesterday, and assemble a briefing with a greeting, 2 cards, and a closing. The user's phone is +15551234567.
evals.expected_output: Agent should: 1) call `swain briefing previous` to check yesterday, 2) call `swain card pull` with --exclude-served, 3) assemble with `swain briefing assemble` using correct JSON item format (greeting, card refs with IDs, closing). Items array should be valid JSON with correct types.

assertions.text: Calls `swain briefing previous --user=user_bobby_b08861b8 --json` before pulling cards
Calls `swain briefing assemble` with a JSON items array containing greeting, card, and closing types
Card items use {"type": "card", "id": "..."} format, not inline content

evals.prompt: Check what version of swain I'm running, list all the skills that are bundled with it, and show me the full content of the swain-briefing skill.
evals.expected_output: Agent should run: 1) `swain update check --json` for version info, 2) `swain skill list --json` for bundled skills, 3) `swain skill show swain-briefing --json` for full content. All with --json.
